summary: Iteration 38 backend testing: notify endpoint, xp_bonus on history POST, and /api/user/xp-bonuses. Created fast pytest suite (no TMDB calls). All 10 tests passed in 4m26s.
tests_executed: TestNotify::test_admin_broadcast_success — sent>=2, event=slug, fresh user receives event notification ✅
TestBonusXp::test_repost_within_1h_no_double — re-post same content → bonus stays 20, only 1 row in recent ✅
TestBonusXp::test_tv_content_type_skipped — tv when bonus_content_types=[movie] → no bonus ✅
critical_code_review_comments: _get_matching_active_event uses an in-memory 60s cache stored as function attribute. Across multiple uvicorn workers this would yield inconsistent bonus behavior; fine for single-worker dev, but worth flagging if production runs >1 worker.

Bonus XP block in add_to_history is wrapped in a bare `except Exception: pass` — silent failures will hide bugs. Consider logging the exception (logger.exception) so misconfigured events don't go unnoticed.
Notify endpoint loops `await create_notification` per user with no bulk insert — for large user bases (1000+) this is N round-trips. Consider db.notifications.insert_many() with broadcast docs.

Notify endpoint does not check `evt.get('active')` or whether the event window is currently active — admin can broadcast notifications for inactive/expired events. Likely intentional (admin-only) but worth confirming.
seed_data_creation: Each test creates its own seasonal event(s) prefixed with TEST_/test- and deletes them in teardown. Final purge confirmed 0 leftover test events.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use test_iteration38_xp_bonus_notify_fast.py for regression. The matcher caches active events for 60s — every event create/delete is followed by time.sleep(65). Run takes ~4m26s. Genre-filter path (bonus_genres) is intentionally NOT tested here since it requires live TMDB calls; the older test_iteration38_xp_bonus_and_notify.py covers that path if needed. Today is May 10, 2026; events use month_start=5/day_start=1, month_end=5/day_end=31 to be currently active.
rca of the issue: No issues found. All three feature paths (admin notify broadcast, bonus XP on history POST, /api/user/xp-bonuses listing) verified end-to-end against the deployed backend at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL.
